name: Trigger
content:
Triggers allow you to play sounds as your song plays.
You can activate triggers using buttons under the Run button. You can also press the key on your keyboard.
When you press a trigger, your tracks will play "live" as the rest of your song plays
You can adjust when the sound plays to change how your song plays
Key takeaway: triggers add tracks to your song "live" when you press a button

palette_params.name: trigger
palette_params.description: The number of the trigger button that, when pressed, will run this code

palette_params.name: trigger start
palette_params.description: When to start the triggered code

short_description: Play sounds when a button on the beat pad is pressed.
